title: Behind the Scenes of Faith
excerpt: Social media has given us a very particular picture of what walking with God looks like. But no one usually talks about what happens behind the scenes — the self-doubt, the slipping back, the hollow feeling. This is where the real work lives.

title: How Do I Get There?
excerpt: You and I need to find our way back. Our lives depend on it. A reflection on the surrendered will, the power of faith, and the long road home.

title: How Did I Get Here?
excerpt: We are where we are because of small decisions that have compounded over time. A look at the steps that lead us down — and the old paths that lead us back.

title: The Mirror Moment
excerpt: Before anything can change, something has to break. A reflection on the moment of honest self-confrontation that precedes every genuine return to God.
